assertions.reason: Provisioning behavior matched the contract: initialize() guarded against an existing vault, provisioned enbox.wallet.root with biometric invalidation enabled, and avoided a biometric read during setup.

matchedTests: provisions secret with expected alias and invalidation policy
calls generateAndStoreSecret once and getSecret ZERO times (no second biometric prompt)
rejects with VAULT_ERROR_ALREADY_INITIALIZED when hasSecret already true

assertions.reason: initialize() returned a valid non-empty 24-word BIP-39 recovery phrase, left the vault initialized and unlocked, and the phrase was not persisted via the mocked SecureStorage layer.

matchedTests: returns a non-empty valid BIP-39 mnemonic and leaves the vault unlocked

assertions.reason: Second initialization attempts failed with VAULT_ERROR_ALREADY_INITIALIZED without reprovisioning or deleting the existing native secret.

matchedTests: rejects VAULT_ERROR_ALREADY_INITIALIZED on a second initialize

assertions.reason: Biometric-unavailable native failures were mapped to VAULT_ERROR_BIOMETRICS_UNAVAILABLE and did not persist partial initialized state.

matchedTests: maps BIOMETRY_UNAVAILABLE to VAULT_ERROR_BIOMETRICS_UNAVAILABLE and does not persist

assertions.reason: The DID derived from the native secret remained stable across initialize() -> lock() -> unlock(), matching the determinism requirement.

matchedTests: derives the same DID after lock + unlock

commandsRun.command: cd "/home/liran/src/enboxorg/mobile" && bun run test -- src/lib/enbox/__tests__/biometric-vault.test.ts -t "provisions secret|calls generateAndStoreSecret once and getSecret ZERO times|rejects with VAULT_ERROR_ALREADY_INITIALIZED when hasSecret already true" --verbose
commandsRun.observation: 3 targeted provisioning tests passed for alias/invalidation policy, no second prompt, and pre-existing-secret rejection.

commandsRun.command: cd "/home/liran/src/enboxorg/mobile" && bun run test -- src/lib/enbox/__tests__/biometric-vault.test.ts -t "returns a non-empty valid BIP-39 mnemonic and leaves the vault unlocked" --verbose
commandsRun.observation: Mnemonic contract test passed: valid non-empty 24-word BIP-39 phrase, vault unlocked/initialized, and no phrase persistence.

commandsRun.command: cd "/home/liran/src/enboxorg/mobile" && bun run test -- src/lib/enbox/__tests__/biometric-vault.test.ts -t "rejects VAULT_ERROR_ALREADY_INITIALIZED on a second initialize" --verbose
commandsRun.observation: Idempotent-hostile initialization test passed; second initialize rejected and native secret was not reprovisioned or deleted.

commandsRun.command: cd "/home/liran/src/enboxorg/mobile" && bun run test -- src/lib/enbox/__tests__/biometric-vault.test.ts -t "maps BIOMETRY_UNAVAILABLE to VAULT_ERROR_BIOMETRICS_UNAVAILABLE and does not persist|maps BIOMETRY_NOT_ENROLLED to VAULT_ERROR_BIOMETRICS_UNAVAILABLE" --verbose
commandsRun.observation: Unavailable/not-enrolled error-mapping tests passed; initialization stayed uninitialized and did not persist partial state.

commandsRun.command: cd "/home/liran/src/enboxorg/mobile" && bun run test -- src/lib/enbox/__tests__/biometric-vault.test.ts -t "derives the same DID after lock \+ unlock" --verbose
commandsRun.observation: Deterministic DID test passed; getDid().uri matched before and after lock/unlock.

frictions: validation-contract.md names split test files (`biometric-vault.initialize.test.ts` and `biometric-vault.derivation.test.ts`) that are not present; equivalent targeted assertions were validated from the consolidated `src/lib/enbox/__tests__/biometric-vault.test.ts` file.
summary: Validated VAL-VAULT-001 through VAL-VAULT-005 on the jest-local surface; all 5 assertions passed via targeted Jest runs plus read-only source inspection.
